name: NC State supersonic tunnel — Config B (streamtraced Busemann inlet) conditions
description: Freestream conditions for the Schram & Narayanaswamy streamtraced-inlet unstart experiment (research plan Config B). The q (contraction) axis maps onto this configuration.
source: Schram & Narayanaswamy, Experiments in Fluids 67:64, 2026. doi:10.1007/s00348-026-04215-0 and companion AIAA J papers
status: PLACEHOLDER freestream: tunnel Mach number is documented (M = 4); static T/p below are ASSUMED from a generic blowdown tunnel (p0 ~ 1.1 MPa, T0 ~ 300 K expanded to M 4) and MUST be replaced with values from the paper PDF before any quantitative use.
geometry_notes: Use busemann.generate_busemann_inlet() for a parametric Busemann-family contour and its TabulatedAreaProfile; the actual experiment used a streamtraced half-Busemann ('sugar scoop') — request the CAD/contour from the NC State group for exact comparisons.
